description: We are a non-profit making government-owned organisation that administers loans and grants to students in colleges and universities in the UK. SLC is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Education .

details.body:
We are a non-profit making government-owned organisation that administers loans and grants to students in colleges and universities in the UK.

SLC is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Education.

ordered_featured_documents.summary: SLC is reminding new full time undergraduate students in England to apply for their student finance before the deadline.
ordered_featured_documents.title: New students in England reminded to apply for student finance before deadline

ordered_featured_documents.summary: It’s important for students to apply before the deadline to make sure their funding is in place for the start of their course.
ordered_featured_documents.title: The student finance deadline for new students is approaching

ordered_featured_documents.summary: 26/27 SFE full-time undergraduate student finance applications are now open.
ordered_featured_documents.title: SLC opens application service for 26/27 academic year

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Apply for student finance and manage your account online.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Full-time undergraduate student finance applications now open for 2026 to 2027!

ordered_featured_documents.summary: As student finance maintenance payments are due to be paid in January, the Student Loans Company (SLC) is reminding students to remain vigilant of scams designed to steal personal and financial information.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Students urged to stay alert for scams as January student finance payments approaches

ordered_featured_documents.summary: The Department for Education (DfE) has announced that Gary Page has been appointed Chair of the Student Loans Company (SLC).
ordered_featured_documents.title: Gary Page appointed Chair of the Student Loans Company

ordered_featured_links.title: How to apply for student finance

details.secondary_corporate_information_pages: Read about the types of information we routinely publish in our Publication scheme. Find out about our commitment to publishing in Welsh. Our Personal information charter explains how we treat your personal information. Read our policy on Social media use.

details.body: The role of SLC’s Board is to set the strategic direction of the company within the policies and business framework set by ministers and oversee the effective and efficient discharge of its statutory responsibilities.

The Executive Director of Customer Operations has responsibility of the largest directorate in Student Loans Company with over 2000 colleagues across our Darlington, Clyde Place, Hillington and Llandudno Junction sites.

Our Customer Operations teams are the front and centre of the organisation and support our customers throughout their whole student finance journey.
The Student Loans Company’s Chief Executive chairs the Executive Leadership Team and is responsible for the management and leadership of SLC’s activities and operations.

The Deputy CEO and Executive Director of Corporate Services is responsible for the SLC Board, Company Secretariat, Governance & Planning, Legal & Data Protection, Corporate Affairs and Estates, Health & Safety & Business Continuity.

role.title: Deputy Chief Executive and Executive Director, Corporate Services

role_appointments.title: David Wallace - Deputy Chief Executive and Chief Customer Officer

details.body:
The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is a member of the Student Loans Company (SLC) Board and the Executive Leadership Team, working closely with senior officials within the Department for Education and the devolved administrations.

The role is responsible to the CEO, the Board and the parent department for the overall financial and commercial integrity and performance of the SLC.

To fulfil these responsibilities, the CFO leads a team that plays an important role in the proper planning, monitoring, governance and reporting of the Company as a major central UK government body. This work includes ensuring that public money is safeguarded at all times and is used appropriately in a way designed to give best value to the taxpayer.

The Chief Information Officer (CIO) develops the technology required to support SLC’s operations and objectives. With responsibility for the technology systems and services across the SLC, this directorate ensures that the organisation exploits new IT as it becomes available, to add value and achieve the company goals.

The Executive Director, Change and Data is responsible for identifying and implementing a efficient and effective approaches to delivering change and continuous improvement at SLC to support customers, colleagues and shareholders.

role_appointments.title: Nauman Dar - Executive Director, Change, Data and Repayments

details.body: The Executive Director, HE and FE Reform is responsible for the development and implementation of SLC’s HE and FE Reform programme to support the UK Government’s reform agenda.  The programme sets out how SLC will work with Government to deliver the proposed policy changes outlined within the Skills for Jobs white paper including the Lifelong Loan Entitlement.

role.title: Executive Director, HE and FE Reform

role_appointments.title: Derek Ross - Executive Director, HE and FE Policy Reform

details.body: The Executive Director, People is responsible for leading SLC’s People directorate and developing it’s People Strategy which aims to ensure that SLC is a great place to work.

role_appointments.title: Gillian Byrdie - Interim Executive Director, People

details.body: The Company Secretary is also DPO at SLC. The role is also responsible for Legal Services, Pensions and Information Governance & Compliance. The Company Secretary is a member of the SLC Board.

role.title: Company Secretary and Data Protection Officer (DPO)

role_appointments.title: Gary Womersley - Company Secretary and Senior Information Risk Owner (SIRO)

details.body: The Chief Digital & Data Officer (CDDO) leads the organisation’s digital transformation and data strategy, driving innovation that enhances customer experience and operational efficiency. As a member of the executive leadership team, the CDDO oversees digital platforms, data governance and analytics, ensuring that digital capabilities align with strategic priorities. They champion a data‑driven culture, enabling teams across the business to use insights, automation, and emerging technologies to deliver better outcomes.

role.title: Executive Director, Chief Digital & Data Officer

role_appointments.title: Kath Moore - Executive Director, Chief Digital & Data Officer

details.body: The role of SLC’s Board is to set the strategic direction of the company within the policies and business framework set by ministers and oversee the effective and efficient discharge of its statutory responsibilities.

Non-executive director, UKHO The board’s role is to support and constructively challenge the executive committee and to apply scrutiny both in the development of business strategies, cases, plans and targets; and in assessing our success in delivering the approved corporate plan.

details.description: If you know someone who is claiming for student finance that they are not entitled to, or who are evading repayment of their student loan let us know by calling or completing our online Fraud Reporting form.

details.description: The Partner Services team manages the relationships with stakeholder and partners in the higher and further education sector. The aim is to allow collaborative working across the sector to ensure the best experience is delivered to students.
details.title: Partner Services
